title: Patagonia Trek — Group of 3
description: Three adventurers visited sites around Patagonia, including the Perito Moreno Glacier and the Fitz Roy massif. A total of three nights and 4 days was spent exploring the area and its natural wonders.

title: Northern Costa Rica Adventure — Group of 2
destination: San Jose, La Fortuna, and Tamarindo Costa Rica
description: Zip-lining through cloud forest, soaking in Arenal hot springs, and white-water rafting on the Sarapiquí River. Two brothers on an unforgettable journey.

title: Spring Break in Belize - group of 13
description: A week-long adventure filled with snorkeling, beach lounging, and exploring ancient Mayan ruins. This trip was all about relaxation and fun in the sun.

title: Family Vacation in Australia and New Zealand
destination: Sydney, Australia in addition to Auckland, Raglan, & Hamilton, New Zealand
description: A perfect blend of city and adventure — exploring the Sydney Opera House, relaxing on Bondi Beach, and then jetting off to New Zealand for some adrenaline-pumping surfing and soccer games.
